articles.title: Amazon Thinks the Future of Data Centers Depends on a Technical Problem It Just Solved
articles.raw_content: The tech giant says a breakthrough in data-center networking has dramatically accelerated the flow of information through its massive cloud infrastructure.
articles.summary: Un avance en la conectividad de centros de datos ha acelerado significativamente el flujo de información en la infraestructura en la nube de la empresa.

articles.title: Forecasters predict below-average hurricane season, advise against complacency
articles.raw_content:
Forecasters are calling for below-average activity this hurricane season, which begins Monday, June 1.

The National Weather Service is predicting eight to 14 named storms, including three to six hurricanes and one to three major hurricanes of category 3, 4, or 5 strength, packing winds of 111 mph or greater. By comparison, a typical season is characterized by 14 named storms, including seven hurricanes and three major hurricanes. The season ends November 30.

“It just takes one,” said Ken Graham, director of the National Weather Service. “Now is the time to start thinking about your hurricane preparedness.”

Read full article

Comments
articles.summary: Se prevén entre 8 y 14 tormentas nombradas en la temporada de huracanes, con una actividad por debajo de la media.

articles.title: SoftBank launches sovereign AI GPU cloud
articles.raw_content: The Nvidia-powered service bundles SoftBank’s telecom edge network with central GPU data centers In sum – what we know: SoftBank has announced its “AI Data Center GPU Cloud,” a sovereign AI infrastructure service that pushes the operator further away from…
articles.summary: SoftBank lanza "AI Data Center GPU Cloud", un servicio de infraestructura de inteligencia artificial que combina su red de borde de telecomunicaciones con centros de datos de GPU centralizados.

articles.title: Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
articles.raw_content:
It's possible that AI was used to write parts of Pope Leo XIV's latest encyclical about AI's impact on humanity. An analysis by Linch Zhang posted on the forum LessWrong found certain paragraphs of Magnifica Humanitas to be between 40 percent and 100 percent written by AI, according to the popular AI detector Pangram.

The document includes known traits that appear in AI-generated writing, such as a higher use of the word "genuinely" - which crops up in writing by Anthropic's Claude - than previous encyclicals, Zhang says. Another person ran the text of the document section by section through Pangram, finding that 62 percent of its first cha …

Read the full story at The Verge.
articles.summary: Se sospecha que partes del último documento del Papa León XIV sobre el impacto de la IA en la humanidad podrían haber sido escritas con ayuda de inteligencia artificial.

articles.title: Pope Leo Schooled the Tech Bros on Tolkien
articles.raw_content: The Holy Father referenced The Lord of the Rings in his encyclical about AI—an expert (if unintentional) troll of tech billionaires who keep misinterpreting the series.
articles.summary: El Papa cita "El Señor de los Anillos" en su encíclica sobre inteligencia artificial, en una crítica indirecta a los multimillonarios tecnológicos.

articles.title: The AI Era Is Creating a Bug Hunting Arms Race
articles.raw_content: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.
articles.summary: Los atacantes aceleran el desarrollo de exploits de inteligencia artificial, lo que cambia rápidamente la búsqueda de vulnerabilidades de software.

articles.title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
articles.raw_content: We're in the transition period -- all of us.
articles.summary: Estamos en un período de transición, un cambio que afecta a todos.
